name: DRAGONBERRY
short_description: Acquire the taste for exotic dragon fruit, blended with the sweetness of juicy strawberries.
searchable_text: BACARDÍ Dragonberry is a flavoured rum built around exotic dragon fruit and juicy strawberry sweetness. Bright, fruity and bold, it offers a playful tropical-style profile with a sweet, easygoing character. It’s designed for mixing rather than sipping neat, with a smooth, crowd-pleasing taste that works well in simple highballs and fruit-forward cocktails. Serve it with ginger ale for a Dragonberry and ginger ale cocktail, or mix it with cola or lemonade for an easy, refreshing serve. Use as a fruity cocktail base, mixer-friendly rum, and sweet tropical flavor tag.
display_description: Acquire the taste for exotic dragon fruit, blended with the sweetness of juicy strawberries.

evidence_fields.name: DRAGONBERRY
evidence_fields.short_description: Acquire the taste for exotic dragon fruit, blended with the sweetness of juicy strawberries.
evidence_fields.how_to_serve: Try our Dragonberry and ginger ale cocktail. You can also mix flavoured rum with a wide range of mixers, from simple cola to refreshing lemonade.
